system.description: This skill is used to control and drive any type of animal-drawn vehicle, such as carts, wagons, carriages, or even plows. Most of the time a dice roll won't be necessary, but in some situations — if the animals rear up, the vehicle loses control, a wheel breaks while traveling at speed, a maneuver is made that the animals are not used to such as a violent turn, hard breaking, driving the vehicle at top speed — it is necessary to make a skill roll to determine the success of the action.
